text: She has flown with him since she could walk, her heart beating in time with the thunder of his wings.
But now, kale can only watch as Skyrith's strength fails.
The fire that once roiled in his chest is little more than dying embers,
and a cold that has no business being in a dragon's blood creeps through his veins.
This is no injury of claw or tooth.
This is the cold sickness, a plague whispered in the oldest songs,
a doom that has found its ancient mark.
And in her hands lies not a sword, but a desperate hope.
